title: Nuclei tool params
description: Per-run parameters accepted for the `nuclei` key of ToolConfig on templates, schedules, and ad-hoc scan overrides.
$comment: Source: internal/model/tool_params.go NucleiParams struct as of agent-spec 3.0. Timeout is a Go time.Duration; serialized as nanoseconds (integer).

templates.description: Specific nuclei template IDs to run. Empty = use the full registered template set.

severity.description: Severity filter. Default includes every level.

rate_limit.description: Global requests/second cap across all templates.

timeout.description: Per-template timeout in nanoseconds (Go time.Duration JSON encoding). Default 5000000000 = 5s.
